steps.t: Thurindath can be found far to the south-east of Henneth Annûn, Adab Dolen can be found to the north of Henneth Annûn, and Torngroth can be found far …
Mablung can be found at Henneth Annûn in North Ithilien. You have scouted the abandoned Ranger refuges and should now tell Mablung of what you discove…
